name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

(* Type invariants *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ q \in Seq(1..K) \land Len(q) = K
  /\ head \in 1..K
  /\ tail \in 1..K
  /\ count \in 0..K

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
  /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
  /\ head = 1
  /\ tail = 1
  /\ count = 0

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  \/ 
    (* Producer action *)
    /\ count < K
    /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]
    /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
    /\ count' = count + 1
    /\ head' = head
  \/ 
    (* Consumer action *)
    /\ count > 0
    /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]
    /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
    /\ count' = count - 1
    /\ tail' = tail
  \/ 
    (* No operation *)
    /\ q' = q
    /\ head' = head
    /\ tail' = tail
    /\ count' = count

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>> 

====

name: Raft Leader Election
Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>> \\
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers \\
          /\ r \notin readers \\
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE \\
          /\ readers' = readers \\
       \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE \\
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers \\
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE \\
          /\ readers' = <<>> \\
       \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers \\
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE \\
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, r)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys: /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Min(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x =< y


CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_CAPACITY, Indices
VARIABLES channel, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ file \in Seq(1..FILE_SIZE)
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Len(file) |-> -> SubSeq(file, i, Min(i+CHUNK_SIZE-1, Len(file)))]
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = <<>>
    /\ channel = <<>>

Next ==
    /\ channel \in Seq(1..CHANNEL_CAPACITY)
    /\ sentChunks \in Seq(1..Len(chunks))
    /\ retransmitCount \in Seq(1..Len(chunks))
    /\ \E i \in 1..Len(chunks) :
        /\ i \notin Indices(sentChunks)
        /\ channel' = Append(channel, i)
        /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, i)
        /\ retransmitCount' = Append(retransmitCount, 1)
    \/ /\ \E i \in Indices(sentChunks) :
        /\ i \in Indices(channel)
        /\ channel' = Remove(channel, i)
        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
        /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
    \/ /\ \E i \in Indices(sentChunks) :
        /\ i \notin Indices(channel)
        /\ channel' = channel
        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
        /\ retransmitCount' = [j \in 1..Len(retransmitCount) |-> retransmitCount[j] + 1

                    0

                retransmitCount[j]]
    \/ /\ \E i \in Indices(sentChunks) :
        /\ i \in Indices(channel)
        /\ channel' = Remove(channel, i)
        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
        /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, channel>>

====

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES clocks, offsets

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next == /\ \A i \in 1..N : clocks[i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]
        /\ \A i \in 1..N : offsets[i] = offsets[i] + (AvgOffset - offsets[i])
        /\ AvgOffset = (1 \div N) * \Sum i \in 1..N : offsets[i]

TypeOK == /\ \A i \in 1..N : clocks[i] \in Int
        /\ \A i \in 1..N : offsets[i] \in Int

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>> ==

====

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

====

generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> 
        /\ infected = <<>> 

Next == /\ known' = known
        /\ infected' = infected \cup known

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Clients

VARIABLES free, allocated, c

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next == \/ /\ free # {}
          /\ free' = free \ {p}
          /\ allocated' = [c \in Clients |-> IF c = client THEN allocated[c] \cup {p} ELSE allocated[c]]
        \/ /\ free' = free
          /\ allocated' = [c \in Clients |-> IF c = client THEN allocated[c] \ {p} ELSE allocated[c]]

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Clients: allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Clients: \A p \in allocated[c]: p \in Pages
          /\ \A c \in Clients: \A p \in allocated[c]: \A c' \in Clients: IF c' # c THEN p \notin allocated[c']

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

====

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES subscribers, messages, nextMsgId, nextSubId

Init == /\ subscribers = <<>>
        /\ messages = <<>>
        /\ nextMsgId = 0
        /\ nextSubId = 0

Next == \/ /\ nextMsgId' = nextMsgId + 1
          /\ messages' = Append(messages, [id |-> nextMsgId, content |-> "New Message"])
          /\ subscribers' = subscribers
          /\ nextSubId' = nextSubId
        \/ /\ nextSubId' = nextSubId + 1
          /\ subscribers' = Append(subscribers, [id |-> nextSubId, topic |-> "New Topic"])
          /\ messages' = messages
          /\ nextMsgId' = nextMsgId

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscribers, messages, nextMsgId, nextSubId>>

====

name: Dekker's Algorithm
Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Node
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES counts

Init == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
       /\ \A n \in Node: counts[n] = [m \in Node |-> 0]

Next == /\ \A n \in Node: counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [m \in Node |-> counts[n][m] + 1]]
       /\ \A n \in Node: \A m \in Node: counts'[n][m] = Max(counts[n][m], counts[m][n])

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>

TypeOK == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
         /\ \A n \in Node: \A m \in Node: counts[n][m] \in Nat

====
